utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates: Present and specific (July 10–14, 2024) ✅

4. accommodation: Includes hotel name, rating, price per night, total cost ✅
5. activities: Multiple days listed with specific activities and costs ✅
6. additional_services: Present but only qualitative info ('City center location, easy access to museums and parks')—no explicit costs ❌
7. total_budget: Present with detailed breakdown and total cost ✅

Thus, 6 items are fully covered and 1 (additional_services) is missing required cost details.
